title: Horseshoe Kidney
buzzwords: Predisposes to UPJ obstruction and stones
Lower poles join across the midline
Associated with Turner syndrome and trisomy 18
Isthmus trapped beneath inferior mesenteric artery

title: Ectopic (Pelvic) Kidney
buzzwords: Risk of hydronephrosis and recurrent UTIs
Kidney remains low in the abdomen
Arrested ascent leaves organ in pelvis
Aberrant arterial supply from iliac vessels

title: Renal Agenesis
buzzwords: Complete congenital absence of renal tissue
Solitary kidney risks hypertension and CKD
Lethal bilateral form produces Potter sequence
No fetal urine, pulmonary hypoplasia at birth
Empty renal fossa on prenatal ultrasound
Ureteric bud fails to induce metanephric blastema

title: Multicystic Dysplastic Kidney (MCDK)
buzzwords: Bilateral form is lethal with oligohydramnios
Primitive tubules balloon into dilated cysts
Cluster-of-grapes kidney lacking renal pelvis architecture

title: Renal Hypoplasia/Dysplasia
buzzwords: Hypertension and impaired growth in kids
